verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Even though my spirit's low, and it seems I can't hardly go But still, I see victory Many times I'm walking by faith And can't see what lies before me, But still I see victory.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I just gotta tell you satan, you can't cross the Bloodline Because I'm covered by His Blood You may stare and you may fight But you're gonna lose this battle tonight Cause remember, you can't cross the Bloodline.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Sometimes our battles get hot And it seems we're fighting a lot oh I remember, I'm standing on the rock So satan, if I were you I'd turn around and give up too 'Cause I do believe, You're bound to lose.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: You may stare and you may fight But you're gonna lose this battle tonight Cause remember, You can't cross the Bloodline You must remember You can't cross the Bloodline.
